name: lesto-bench-app
description: Lesto benchmark app. A root workspace member so @lesto/* resolve via physical node_modules symlinks — required by esbuild/wrangler/Alchemy bundling AND (since Bun 1.3 isolated installs) by `bun run` itself. workspace:* deps point at the same packages/*/src the whole repo runs, so the measured code is byte-identical. Not matched by the `@lesto/*` / `@lesto/example-*` workspace-script filters, so it stays out of the test/lint/typecheck/coverage/publish gates.
